home.headline: Learn chess with grandmasters
home.subheadline: In-depth chess courses for all skill levels

notFound.heading: Looks like this position isn't on the board.
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

users.changeRoleWarning: This will update the user's access immediately.

forbidden.title: 403 — Access Denied
forbidden.body: You don't have permission to access this page.

brand.sub: Interactive PGN courses, annotated by titled coaches. Bookmark any position, build your repertoire, and review on your schedule.

signup.heading: Start your first opening.
signup.helper: Free forever. No card required to browse or preview.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with one uppercase letter and one number.

login.heading: Pick up where you left off.
login.helper: Welcome back! Enter your details to continue.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.helper: Enter your registered email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.successBody: We've sent a password reset link to your email. The link expires in 24 hours.

checkEmail.heading: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We've sent a verification email. Click the link in the email to activate your account. The link expires in 24 hours.

resetPassword.heading: Create a new password.
resetPassword.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with one uppercase letter and one number.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

validation.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordNeedsUppercase: Password must have at least one uppercase letter.
validation.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must have at least one number.
validation.tosRequired: You must agree to the terms of service.
